title: デビュー戦の後に・賑々しく狂おしき

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki looks pretty exhausted after her
debut race. It appears the charged atmosphere
added fuel to her competitive spirit, and she had
difficulty keeping her emotions in check.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, I spot Yaeno training on her
own. She says she's been feeling doubtful about
her running since her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her to confide in me, and it comes out that
she's hesitant to burden me with her naturally wild
personality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm her trainer. I tell her that I accept her,
faults and all. Seeing the sincerity in my eyes, she
decides to put her faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to run in the Classic Triple Crown tour
and select the Mainichi Hai as a race to help
prepare for it.
